adīna (3. a + dīna)
1〉 adj. nicht niedergedrückt, muthig: adīnasattva  R. 4,29,25 .
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Fürsten, eines Sohnes des Sahadeva,  VP. 412 . ( BHĀG. P.  ahīna).

results.rendered_html:
adīna a. Not low or depressed, high-spirited; mighty, not poor; rich, happy.
Comp.
— ātman, -vṛtti,
— sattva a. not depressed in spirit, highspirited, high-mettled.
